meaning: adj.多发源点的,发生于多中心的 影响多中心的
examples: Method The clinical test of multicentric random parallel control was used.
The pathogenesis of this multicentric disorder may be associated with autoimmune disease.
Because multicentric CD is so rare, there is not a lot of information on how well chemotherapy works.
Infection by a virus called the human herpesvirus 8 (HHV-8) is associated with Castleman disease, and doctors suspect that it may play a role, especially in multicentric Castleman disease.
